James Anderson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated and skilled Forklift Operator with over 5 years of experience in warehouse environments. Proficient in operating various types of forklifts including reach trucks and counterbalance units. Committed to maintaining safety standards and efficiency in all operations. Strong understanding of Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) and logistics processes.

Experience

Forklift Operator  
ABC Logistics, Atlanta, GA  
June 2020 – Present  
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to move materials within a fast-paced distribution center.  
- Utilize WMS to track inventory, manage stock levels, and ensure accurate order fulfillment.  
- Conduct regular safety checks and maintenance on equipment to adhere to OSHA Class I/IV/V regulations.
- Train and mentor new employees on forklift operations and safety procedures.

Forklift Operator  
XYZ Warehouse, Atlanta, GA  
March 2018 – May 2020  
- Responsible for loading and unloading goods using various forklifts, ensuring compliance with safety standards.  
- Managed inventory using a Warehouse Management System, improving accuracy by 15%.  
- Collaborated with team members to optimize workflow and reduce downtime during peak operations.

Warehouse Associate  
Delta Distribution, Atlanta, GA  
January 2016 – February 2018  
- Assisted in daily warehouse operations including picking, packing, and shipping orders.  
- Gained hands-on experience with forklift operation and safety protocols.

Certifications
- OSHA Forklift Certification (Class I/IV/V)  
- Forklift Safety Training Course  

Skills
- Proficient in operating reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts  
- Strong knowledge of Warehouse Management Systems (WMS)  
- Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
